skills.name: Good Morning
skills.description: Morning orientation that recaps recent work and helps decide what to focus on.

skills.name: End of Day
skills.description: Logs what was worked on so the next session can pick up where things left off.

skills.name: New Project
skills.description: Creates a new project in the workspace with a pre-filled project overview.

skills.name: Help
skills.description: Shows everything Claude can help with in this workspace.

skills.name: Skills Dashboard
skills.description: Generate a visual directory of every skill and slash command you have installed.

skills.name: Skills Audit
skills.description: Audit your Cowork system — finds duplicates, overlaps, and broken pointers.

skills.name: Find Skills
skills.description: Discover and install new skills from the open agent-skills ecosystem.

skills.name: Customize
skills.description: Shows how to customize installed skills to your specific use case.

skills.name: Skill Creator
skills.description: Create new skills, modify existing ones, and run evaluations to test performance.

skills.name: Schedule
skills.description: Create or update a scheduled task that runs automatically.

skills.name: New Transcript
skills.description: Turn any YouTube link or audio file into a transcript, summary, and Notion entry.

skills.name: Add to Meal Library
skills.description: Add new meals to your Notion Menu Library with full recipe content.

skills.name: Quick Research
skills.description: Research any topic from multiple sources and deliver a clean summary report.

skills.name: Last 30 Days
skills.description: Research what any person, brand, or company has been up to over the last 30 days.

skills.name: Learning Path Generator
skills.description: Create a structured learning plan for any skill or topic.

skills.name: Learn
skills.description: Deep explanations, ELI5 breakdowns, flashcards, and quizzes for any concept.

skills.name: Email Drafter
skills.description: Write professional emails for any situation.

skills.name: Difficult Conversation Prep
skills.description: Prepare for tough conversations with a script and responses to pushback.

skills.name: Brain Dump
skills.description: Dump everything on your mind and get it organized into projects, tasks, next steps.

skills.name: Take a Step Back
skills.description: Zoom out from any conversation for an honest evaluation of whether you're on track.

skills.name: Budget Dashboard
skills.description: Interactive financial dashboard with sliders, charts, and savings projections.

skills.name: Walk Me Through
skills.description: Step-by-step guidance for any task in dead-simple language.

skills.name: Canvas Design
skills.description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf — posters, graphics, static designs.

skills.name: Explainer Graphic
skills.description: Create visual infographics using real-world analogies.

skills.name: Visual Explainer
skills.description: Beautiful self-contained HTML page that visually explains any concept or system.

skills.name: Slide Deck Builder
skills.description: Generate visual slide decks with rich components.

skills.name: Animated Website
skills.description: Turn any video into a luxury scroll-animated website with parallax effects.

skills.name: IG Carousel
skills.description: Generate premium Instagram carousel posts with cinematic cover and content slides.

skills.name: Algorithmic Art
skills.description: Create algorithmic art using p5.js — flow fields, particle systems, generative patterns.

skills.name: Visual Page Builder
skills.description: Generate beautiful self-contained HTML pages that explain any concept visually.

skills.name: Workflow Visualizer
skills.description: Map any system or workflow as a beautiful interactive HTML diagram.
